kinyarwanda.inverts_input_built_from_1_pmos_1_nmos: Ihindura icyinjira. Yubatswe kuva PMOS 1 + NMOS 1 (CMOS inverter).
kinyarwanda.output_high_only_when_both_inputs_are_: Igisohoka kiri hejuru gusa iyo ibyinjira byombi biri hejuru. NAND + NOT (transisitori 6).
kinyarwanda.output_high_when_any_input_is_high_nor: Igisohoka kiri hejuru iyo icyinjira icyo ari cyo cyose kiri hejuru. NOR + NOT (transisitori 6).
kinyarwanda.universal_gate_2_series_nmos_2_paralle: Irembo rusange! NMOS 2 zikurikirana + PMOS 2 zibangikanye. Ubwenge bwose buva NAND.
kinyarwanda.universal_gate_2_parallel_nmos_2_serie: Irembo rusange! NMOS 2 zibangikanye + PMOS 2 zikurikirana.
kinyarwanda.output_high_when_inputs_differ_key_for: Igisohoka kiri hejuru iyo ibyinjira bitandukanye. Ingenzi ku babyongera. Bikoresha transisitori ~8.
kinyarwanda.output_high_when_inputs_match_used_in_: Igisohoka kiri hejuru iyo ibyinjira bihura. Bikoreshwa mu bigereranya.
kinyarwanda.build_a_circuit_from_components_add_pa: Wubaka sirkwi uhereye ku bice. Ongeramo ibice, hanyuma ukore igereranya!
kinyarwanda.click_components_above_to_add_them: Kanda ku bice biri hejuru kugira ngo ubyongereho
kinyarwanda.a_silicon_ingot_is_pulled_from_molten_: Igiti cya silikoni gikururwa kuva muri silikoni yashongeshejwe hakoreshejwe uburyo bwa Czochralski kuri ~1414 °C.
kinyarwanda.the_ingot_is_sliced_into_thin_wafers_7: Igiti gikatwamo wafer ntoya (~775 μm ubugari) hakoreshejwe imyembe y'insinga ya diyama.
kinyarwanda.a_thin_layer_of_sio_is_grown_on_the_wa: Urwego ruto rwa SiO₂ rwororerwa hejuru ya wafer kuri ~1000 °C mu ziko rya ogisijeni.
kinyarwanda.uv_light_transfers_circuit_patterns_fr: Urumuri rwa UV rwohereza imiterere ya sirkwi kuva ku mask ijya kuri wafer zisize fotoresist.
kinyarwanda.unwanted_material_is_removed_by_chemic: Ibikoresho bitifuzwa bikurwaho hakoreshejwe gushushanya kwa shimi (gitobetse) cyangwa plasma (kumye).
kinyarwanda.dopant_atoms_are_shot_into_the_silicon: Atomu za dopant zirasirwa muri silikoni ku mbaraga nyinshi kugira ngo zihindure ibiranga byazo by'amashanyarazi.
kinyarwanda.metal_and_insulator_layers_are_deposit: Inzego z'icyuma na insulator bishyirwaho hakoreshejwe tekiniki za CVD, PVD cyangwa ALD.
kinyarwanda.metal_interconnects_are_patterned_and_: Amahuriro y'icyuma ashushanywa kandi akozwe akaba ahwanye. Inzego nyinshi zubaka insinga za sirkwi.
kinyarwanda.moore_s_law_graph_showing_transistor_c: Igishushanyo cy'Itegeko rya Moore kigaragaza umubare wa transisitori kuva 1965 kugeza 2030
kinyarwanda.6_transistors_per_bit_2_cross_coupled_: Transisitori 6 kuri buri bit: inverter 2 zambukiranye + transisitori 2 zo kwinjira. Bikoreshwa mu cache za CPU.
kinyarwanda.1_transistor_1_capacitor_per_bit_must_: Transisitori 1 + kapasitori 1 kuri buri bit. Bigomba kuvugururwa buri ~64 ms. Bikoreshwa mu bubiko bw'ingenzi (module za RAM).
kinyarwanda.floating_gate_transistor_traps_charge_: Transisitori y'irembo ryareremba ifata charge. NOR: kwinjira bidasanzwe, bikoreshwa muri firmware/BIOS.
kinyarwanda.series_connected_floating_gates_sequen: Amarembo yareremba ahujwe mu rukurikirane. Kwinjira mu rukurikirane ariko byuzuye cyane. SSD, drive za USB, amakarita ya SD.
kinyarwanda.ferroelectric_capacitor_stores_charge_: Kapasitori ferroelectric ibika charge hamwe na polarization isigaye. Ntibapfa + kwandika byihuse. Bikoreshwa mu makarita y'ubwenge, imodoka.
kinyarwanda.voltage_amplifier_high_input_impedance: Umwongereza w'amashanyarazi. Impedance yo kwinjira iri hejuru (∞ ku byiza). Inyungu = -gₘRₓ. Ihindura ikimenyetso. Umwongereza wa MOSFET usanzwe cyane.
kinyarwanda.voltage_buffer_gain_1_no_inversion_low: Buffer y'amashanyarazi. Inyungu ≈ 1 (nta guhindura). Impedance yo gusohoka iri hasi → nziza yo gutwara imizigo. Kandi bita ukurikira inkomoko.
kinyarwanda.current_buffer_low_input_impedance_non: Buffer y'umuyoboro. Impedance yo kwinjira iri hasi. Ntihindura. Bandwidth yagutse → nziza ku porogaramu za RF.
kinyarwanda.bjt_voltage_amplifier_gain_g_r_inverts: Umwongereza w'amashanyarazi BJT. Inyungu = -gₘRᶜ. Ihindura ikimenyetso. Inyungu iri hejuru kuruta MOSFET ariko impedance yo kwinjira iri hasi.
kinyarwanda.amplifies_difference_of_two_inputs_rej: Yongera itandukaniro ry'ibyinjira bibiri. Yanga urusaku rwa common-mode. Ishingiro rya op-amp. CMRR akenshi >60dB.
kinyarwanda.band_gaps_between_0_5_and_3_5_ev_are_s: Icyuho cya band hagati ya 0.5 na 3.5 eV ni semiconductor.
kinyarwanda.extra_electrons_n_for_negative_charge_: Electron z'inyongera = N ku batwara charge Mbi.
kinyarwanda.carriers_recombine_at_the_junction_lea: Abatwara bongera guhurira ku ihuriro basiga ion zihamye.
kinyarwanda.positive_gate_attracts_electrons_to_fo: Irembo ryiza rikurura electron kugira ngo rishireho umuyoboro.
kinyarwanda.forward_pushing_carriers_toward_the_ju: Imbere = gusunika abatwara BAJYA ku ihuriro.
kinyarwanda.more_thermal_energy_more_electron_hole: Ingufu z'ubushyuhe nyinshi = amakoro ya electron-icyobo menshi.
kinyarwanda.nand_can_implement_not_and_or_everythi: NAND ishobora gushyira mu bikorwa NOT, AND, OR — byose!
kinyarwanda.speed_mobility_gaas_8500_vs_si_1400_cm: Umuvuduko ∝ imyimurire. GaAs: 8500 vs Si: 1400 cm²/Vs.
kinyarwanda.zener_diodes_are_designed_to_conduct_i: Diyodi za Zener zakozwe kugira ngo zitware inyuma!
kinyarwanda.boron_has_3_valence_electrons_1_fewer_: Borone ifite electron 3 za valence (1 nke kuruta Si).
kinyarwanda.v_kt_q_ln_n_n_n_for_typical_doping_lev: Vₑᵢ = (kT/q)ln(NₐNₓ/nᵢ²) ku nzego zisanzwe zo gushyiramo.
kinyarwanda.in_cmos_one_transistor_is_always_off_b: Muri CMOS, transisitori imwe ihora izimye, ibuza umuyoboro.
kinyarwanda.n_1_for_ideal_junction_n_2_for_recombi: n=1 ku ihuriro ryiza, n=2 ku guhuza mu karere ka kugabanuka.
kinyarwanda.e_3_4_ev_allows_higher_voltage_operati: Eₗ = 3.4 eV yemerera gukora ku mashanyarazi menshi.
kinyarwanda.sum_a_xor_b_carry_a_and_b: Igiteranyo = A XOR B, Gutwara = A AND B.
kinyarwanda.higher_v_ce_widens_the_depletion_regio: V_CE iri hejuru yagura akarere ka kugabanuka mu base.
kinyarwanda.e_1_l_smaller_box_higher_energy_steps: E ∝ 1/L² — agasanduku gato = intambwe z'ingufu nini.
kinyarwanda.telecom_lasers_use_ingaasp_quantum_wel: Laser za telecom zikoresha amariba ya kwantumu InGaAsP kugira ngo zigenzure uburebure bw'umuraba neza.
kinyarwanda.6t_sram_2_cross_coupled_inverters_4t_2: SRAM 6T: inverter 2 zambukiranye (4T) + transisitori 2 zo kwinjira.
kinyarwanda.dram_stores_bits_as_charge_on_a_tiny_c: DRAM ibika bits nka charge kuri kapasitori ntoya — irava!
kinyarwanda.the_floating_gate_is_electrically_isol: Irembo ryareremba ryitandukanyijwe mu buryo bw'amashanyarazi n'inzego za oxide.
kinyarwanda.l1_cache_needs_the_fastest_possible_ac: Cache ya L1 ikeneye igihe cyo kwinjira cyihuta bishoboka.
kinyarwanda.it_s_a_buffer_unity_gain_impedance_tra: Ni buffer: inyungu imwe, guhindura impedance.
kinyarwanda.higher_gain_lower_bandwidth_a_bw_gbw_c: Inyungu iri hejuru = bandwidth iri hasi. Aᵥ × BW = GBW = constant.
kinyarwanda.a_swarm_of_logic_bugs_what_gate_output: Umukumbi w'amakosa y'ubwenge! Ni irihe rembo risohora 1 iyo A=0?
kinyarwanda.a_voltage_spike_is_overloading_which_d: Kwiyongera kw'amashanyarazi biratera umutwaro! Ni iyihe gikoresho kigenzura amashanyarazi?
kinyarwanda.temperature_rising_in_a_semiconductor_: Ubushyuhe burazamuka! Muri semiconductor, kuzamuka kw'ubushyuhe bikora iki ku bushobozi bwo gutwara?
kinyarwanda.an_enemy_flipped_all_bits_which_gate_c: Umwanzi yahinduye bits zose! Ni irihe rembo rishobora guhindura buri kimenyetso?
kinyarwanda.carriers_are_leaking_what_narrows_the_: Abatwara barava! Ni iki gituma akarere ka kugabanuka kaba kagufi?
kinyarwanda.electrostatic_discharge_what_protects_: Gusohoka kw'amashanyarazi ahagaze! Ni iki kirinda IC kuva ESD?
kinyarwanda.clock_is_unstable_cmos_power_dissipati: Isaha ntihamye! Gusohoka kw'ingufu za CMOS bihuye na:
kinyarwanda.direct_short_what_is_the_threshold_vol: Short itaziguye! Ni iyihe voltage y'urwego rwa Si-MOSFET isanzwe?
kinyarwanda.electrons_are_tunneling_through_the_ox: Electron zica muri oxide! Mu iriba rya kwantumu, iriba rigufi =
kinyarwanda.memory_bits_are_flipping_which_memory_: Bits z'ububiko zirahinduka! Ni ubuhe bwoko bw'ububiko bukeneye kuvugururwa?
kinyarwanda.signal_to_noise_ratio_dropping_what_do: Igipimo cy'ikimenyetso ku rusaku kiragabanuka! Ni iki umwongereza utandukanye wanga?
kinyarwanda.final_boss_what_limits_transistor_scal: Umuyobozi wa nyuma! Ni iki gituma transisitori itagabanuka munsi ya oxide y'irembo ~1 nm?
kinyarwanda.protect_your_chip_from_waves_of_hardwa: Rinda chip yawe imiraba y'abanzi ba hardware! Koresha ubumenyi bwa semiconductor kugira ngo urwane.
kinyarwanda.doping_silicon_with_phosphorus_n_type_: Gushyira silikoni fosifore (ubwoko-n) cyangwa borone (ubwoko-p) ni ishingiro rya buri chip yigeze gukorwa. Ihuriro PN ni igice cy'ubwubatsi cya buri diyodi + LED + selire y'izuba + transisitori.
kinyarwanda.bias_a_transistor_calculate_band_gap_e: Shyira bias kuri transisitori, bara ingufu z'icyuho cya band, hanura umuyoboro ku mashanyarazi. Ibibazo bya AP Physics 2 + intangiriro ya EE hamwe n'ibisubizo intambwe ku yindi.
kinyarwanda.battle_head_to_head_circuit_duels: Intambara — imikino ya sirkwi umaso ku maso
kinyarwanda.time_pressure_rounds_build_a_circuit_f: Ibihe by'igitutu cy'igihe: wubaka sirkwi vuba kuruta saa. Bipima niba gutekereza kwa semiconductor ari ukwikora, atari gusa kumenyekana.
kinyarwanda.bardeen_brattain_shockley_invented_the: Bardeen + Brattain + Shockley bahimbye transisitori muri Bell Labs (1947); Nobel 1956. Itegeko rya Moore: umubare wa transisitori wikuba kabiri buri ~myaka 2; wamaze imyaka 50+ mbere yo kugabanuka.
kinyarwanda.minimal_dopant_pure_semiconductor_high: Dopant nke. Semiconductor isukuye — resistivity iri hejuru.
kinyarwanda.some_carriers_introduced_typical_extri: Bamwe mu batwara batangijwe. Uburyo bwa extrinsic busanzwe.
kinyarwanda.approaching_metallic_behavior_used_for: Byegera imyitwarire y'icyuma. Bikoreshwa ku mahuriro.
kinyarwanda.adjust_dopant_concentration_temperatur: Hindura ubwinshi bwa dopant, ubushyuhe, ibikoresho. Uburyo bwa band 4 butandukanye. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kinyarwanda.hypothesis_how_does_temperature_affect: Igitekerezo: Ni gute ubushyuhe bugira ingaruka ku bwinshi bw'abatwara?
kinyarwanda.compare_si_and_gaas_at_same_concentrat: Gereranya Si na GaAs ku bwinshi bumwe. Kuki bitandukanye?
kinyarwanda.find_two_settings_producing_same_regim: Shaka amagenamiterere abiri asohora uburyo bumwe.
kinyarwanda.explain_how_concentration_temperature_: Sobanura uko ubwinshi, ubushyuhe, n'ibikoresho hamwe bigena uburyo.
kinyarwanda.design_note_discrete_4_state_marker_no: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cya leta 4 gitandukanye; nta manota y'ubwinshi bw'abatwara; nta guhishura — nk'uko byateguwe.
